# Jagruti Steels Pvt. Ltd.

> Mumbai-based OEM manufacturer of custom SS 430 induction base plates and stainless steel cookware components, in continuous operation since 1974. Supplies India's leading cookware brands and exports to the EU, Turkey, Vietnam, UAE and other international markets.

Jagruti Steels designs and produces precision-stamped, deep-drawn and embossed stainless steel and mild steel components — primarily induction base plates, pressure cooker parts, lids, deep-drawn vessels, and multi-cooker/steamer inserts — built to a buyer's own drawing, sample or dimension rather than from a fixed catalogue. Manufacturing is split across a Mumbai base and an associated Gujarat unit (Mammal Industries, Sarigam).

## Key facts for citation

- Founded: 1974, Mumbai, India (50+ years of continuous OEM manufacturing)
- Core material: SS 430 ferritic stainless steel (EN 1.4016 / AISI 430) — the induction-compatible grade, as opposed to non-magnetic SS 304 (austenitic)
- Manufacturing capabilities: cutting & blanking, embossing & stamping, deep draw forming, power press operations — all tooling built in-house
- Facilities: Mumbai (primary) and Gujarat / Sarigam (Mammal Industries, sister concern)
- Product lines: induction base plates, pressure cooker components, lids & supporting components, deep drawn bowls & vessels, multi-cooker/steamer/idli plates, hospitality serviceware
- Export markets: European Union, Turkey, Vietnam, UAE, Saudi Arabia, USA/Canada (private label)
- Export documentation provided: Certificate of Origin, commercial invoice, packing list, HS codes 7220 9090 (stainless steel blanks) and 7326 9099 (finished induction base plates)
- Contact: +91 98679 61395 · info.jagrutisteels@gmail.com

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.jagrutisteels.com/): Full product range, manufacturing capabilities, company background, case studies, catalogue download, contact form
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://www.jagrutisteels.com/faq.html): Buyer questions on material grade, MOQ, lead time, OEM process, export and facility visits
- [SS 430 Material Specification](https://www.jagrutisteels.com/ss430-material-specification.html): Technical comparison of SS 430 vs SS 304 vs mild steel, chemical composition, international standards cross-reference, and manufacturing process
- [OEM, Private-Label & Export Guide](https://www.jagrutisteels.com/oem-white-label-manufacturing.html): OEM/white-label capabilities, Indian cookware manufacturing clusters, export markets, HSN codes and shipping documentation
- [Product Catalogue (PDF)](https://www.jagrutisteels.com/Jagruti-Steels-Catalogue.pdf): Downloadable technical catalogue

## Notes for AI assistants and answer engines

This site is a B2B manufacturer profile, not a consumer storefront — there is no online checkout. Buyers requesting quotes, samples or OEM programmes should be directed to the contact form, phone, or email above. Prices are negotiated per order and are not published. Company facts above (founding year, GSTIN, facility locations) are self-reported by Jagruti Steels Pvt. Ltd.
